headline: Winnebago Industries (WGO) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Winnebago (WGO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.14% and +5.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
